## Scope

This PR should be reviewed only within the stated sprint scope.

## Checklist

- [ ] No direct push to `main` was used.
- [ ] The current visual homepage was not unintentionally changed.
- [ ] No existing portfolio pages were overwritten.
- [ ] `robots.txt` and `sitemap.xml` are valid.
- [ ] RU/EN foundation pages have canonical and hreflang links.
- [ ] The branch was compared against `main` before merge.

## Notes for reviewer

Please flag only regressions, unexpected deletions, broken links, SEO mistakes, or scope creep.
